description: Asymptomatic or mild symptoms; clinical or diagnostic observations only; intervention not indicated
Moderate symptoms; minimal local or noninvasive intervention indicated; limiting age-appropriate activities
Severe or medically significant but not immediately life-threatening; hospitalization indicated
clinical_action: Discontinue immunotherapy; IV corticosteroids (1-2 mg/kg); hospitalization
Permanently discontinue immunotherapy; high-dose IV corticosteroids; ICU
